# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (Apr 9, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 9, 2026, focused on expanding the plugin's capabilities through a significant new pull request aimed at achieving feature parity with OpenClaw.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#46](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/46) feat: OpenClaw parity — Introduces support for typing indicators, reactions, streaming, slash commands, and additional features.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
